title: Message System

methods.name: __construct
methods.notes: Resolves string role via MessageRole::tryFrom(); throws InvalidArgumentException on invalid role

methods.name: tryFrom
methods.notes: Factory: accepts Message instance, array ['role','content'], or object with role/content props; throws InvalidArgumentException otherwise

methods.name: __construct
methods.notes: Calls parent::__construct('user', $content); wraps attachments via Collection::wrap()

methods.name: __construct
methods.notes: Calls parent::__construct('assistant', $content); defaults toolCalls to new Collection if null

methods.name: __construct
methods.notes: Calls parent::__construct('tool_result', content: null); content is always null

relationships: Message uses MessageRole (property + constructor resolution via tryFrom)
key_notes: Message is the concrete base class (not abstract); subclasses simply fix the role string in parent constructor call.
MessageRole is a PHP 8.1 backed string enum; Message::__construct() accepts both MessageRole enum and raw string, resolving via MessageRole::tryFrom().
Message::tryFrom() is a static factory supporting array/object hydration — useful for deserializing API responses.

UserMessage supports optional file/media attachments (Collection); AssistantMessage carries tool call results (Collection); ToolResultMessage carries tool results (Collection) and always has null content.
